title: docs: add polly review trigger convention
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Summoning Polly
gist.blurb: Added a quick note to our agent docs on how to summon Polly for PR reviews. Just whisper her name in a comment!
gist.summary: Updated AGENTS.md to document the convention for triggering automated PR reviews by mentioning 'polly' in a comment.
gist.impact: Contributors now have clear instructions on how to request an AI review on their pull requests.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about summoning 'Polly' (the bee mascot) for a review by saying her name. Visual: The cute bee mascot (Polly) appearing magically from a glowing comment box or terminal, holding a tiny magnifying glass (for reviewing code).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses and holding a magnifying glass, magically popping out of a glowing retro terminal screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
